_comment: Assignment scenario: Mixed Data Simulation — Global Daily Report. Ingests from CSV (population data), JSON API (JSONPlaceholder posts as stand-in for structured data), and a second HTTP JSON source concurrently. Demonstrates fan-out ingestion across source types.

sources._comment: CSV source: height/weight population dataset fetched over HTTP
JSON API source: JSONPlaceholder posts (100 records)
JSON API source: JSONPlaceholder comments (500 records)
